description: CSS box model: margin, padding, border styles/radius, box-sizing, width/height constraints
visual_assertions: The .margin-all box should have 20px of space on all sides separating it from surrounding elements
The .padding-all box should have 30px of internal padding between its border and its text content
The .border-solid box should show a visible 3px solid blue border
The .border-dashed box should show a visible 2px dashed red border
The .radius-sm box should have slightly rounded corners (4px radius)
The .radius-lg box should have noticeably rounded corners (20px radius)
The .radius-pill should appear as a pill/capsule shape
The .radius-circle should appear as or close to a circle
The .fixed-w box should be constrained to 300px width
Background colors should be clearly visible on each styled div
